response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) plus a university thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no SQL Server/Oracle experience, no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure, and the career trajectory is firmly in web/full-stack work with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Communication skills and engineering fundamentals appear strong, but the core mandatory requirements are not met.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development
Demonstrated communication ability through workshops, talks, and teaching
Polyglot experience including some low-level/systems work in DLang and C/C++
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, no recent C++ work
No SQL Server or Oracle experience and no Windows-platform development history
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: Insufficient C++ experience vs. 5-10 year requirement
No financial services / capital markets domain background
Missing SQL Server/Oracle and Windows platform experience
